message:
chore: add codex ephemeral dirs and beads recovery patterns to .gitignore

Add patterns for codex CLI temp directories (.codex-local-check/,
.codex-bench/, .codex-tmp/) and beads ephemeral artifacts (bad, backup,
rebuild, reindex, vacuum snapshots, and recovery dirs).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -50,3 +50,16 @@ storage.sqlite3-wal.corrupt-*
 
 # Snapshot test review artifacts (regenerated by insta)
 *.snap.new
+
+# Codex CLI ephemeral directories
+.codex-local-check/
+.codex-bench/
+.codex-tmp/
+
+# Beads ephemeral artifacts
+.beads/*.bad_*
+.beads/*.backup_*
+.beads/*.rebuild_*
+.beads/*.reindex_test_*
+.beads/*.vacuum_test_*
+.beads/recovery*/
